page_content:
Other Requirements for the Major

In the Department of Art History and Archaeology, 3xx-level and 4xx-level courses are differentiated. 3xx-level courses focus on period or topical

2 Art History Major

surveys and 4xx-level courses highlight content- or theme-based material. Majors should complete the 2xx-level surveys before they enroll in 3xx- or 4xx-level courses. Students are strongly encouraged to take supporting area courses that complement the art history major. No course with a grade lower than “C-" may be used to satisfy major or supporting area requirements.
